import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

import os
import json
import torch
import torch.nn.functional as F
import math
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image
from tsr.system import TSR
import inspect

device = 'cuda:0'

# Load model
model = TSR.from_pretrained(
    "/models/triposr",
    config_name="config.yaml",
    weight_name="model.ckpt",
)
model.renderer.set_chunk_size(131072)
model.to(device)
model.eval()

# Print renderer class and forward source
print("=== Renderer class ===")
print(type(model.renderer))
print("\n=== Renderer forward source ===")
print(inspect.getsource(model.renderer.forward))

# Check if renderer has background_color attribute
print("\n=== Renderer attributes ===")
for attr in dir(model.renderer):
    if not attr.startswith('_'):
        val = getattr(model.renderer, attr)
        if not callable(val):
            print(f"  {attr} = {val}")

# Also check the render method of TSR system
print("\n=== TSR.render source ===")
print(inspect.getsource(model.render))
